system.description:
Thena is one of the least emotionally scarred survivors in her weird family. She is a leading light in the art world. She is patron to many artists and her criticism and evaluation drives a significant element of Duskvol's art scene. Whispers have noted she has an unusual connection to the Ghost Field.

Sometimes she hires outsiders to sort out one of her artists' problems. She has a private gallery that she updates with her current trending tastes—those in the art market need to know what's in it.
